TestCase z39Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_b = (int*)malloc(t1.na * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_b, t1.b, t1.na * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.b = follow_case_b;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.na == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Operation: set all elements to 500 when element < 500
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.na; ++i) {
        if (follow_case.b[i] < 500) {
            follow_case.b[i] = 500;
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
